summary: Stock discovery and trading app for first-time Indian investors.
editor_note: Retail investing apps usually hide complexity behind confetti; this one tries to make discovery the product. Trackk shows prompt-based Trackk Nest screeners, IPO verdicts, single-screen trading, SEBI registration, and 4.7/4.6 app-store ratings. Unlike broker clones built for power users, the bet is that first-time Indian investors need explainable search before execution. The risk is whether F&O ambition nudges beginners toward speculation.
why_featured: Seed for Gen Z investing app
